label: About
title: How this page was made
short_blurb: This edition was generated from recent saved signals, inspected source URLs, an AI-composed scene brief, an AI-generated plate, and a post-plate vision mapping pass.
body: Signal mining read recent Markdown from the configured Obsidian vault.
Automated research inspected linked source metadata and media previews.
Source windows bind to saved URLs from the vault signal set.
Artifact mapping used the generated plate as evidence before package assembly.
